prompt: Create a single full-body chibi character render in a chunky low-poly voxel/pixel-art 3D style on a plain white background. The character is a cute petite girl avatar with an oversized head, tiny body, pale skin, huge glossy black eyes with white highlights, a small neutral mouth, and bright neon green bobbed hair with straight bangs and two short segmented spiral pigtails. She wears large black cat-ear headphones with pointed ears, plus a small skull hair clip on the right side of her bangs. Add oversized purple rounded glasses. Her outfit is a school-uniform-inspired look: black blazer, white shirt, black necktie, green-and-blue plaid skirt, white socks, and black shoes. Behind her on the left side, attach a thin black fishing-rod-like stick or dangling accessory holding exactly 1 small orange carrot with green leaves, hanging beside her head. Pose her standing upright facing slightly to the viewer’s right with arms down, feet close together, cute toy-like proportions. Use visible square pixels, blocky edges, simple flat lighting, subtle ambient shadow, crisp silhouette, and a clean isolated character-design presentation.
